entries.description: Remedial Codex Part 1 — planetary propitiation, gemology, mantra practice, daily dinacharya. Chart-first remedial philosophy: strengthen architecturally-strong planets, dharmic register over ritual-density, befriend (not pacify) AmK Saturn / Avayogi Mars / exalted Ketu. Source for doc_type=l4_remedial RAG chunks.

Remedial Codex Part 2 — yantra recommendations (Shree Yantra primary), devata-specific practices, temporal interventions, domain-specific remedies, intervention heatmap. Source for doc_type=l4_remedial RAG chunks.

Lifetime Jyotish timeline — life arc from 1984 birth through Saturn Libra return 2041–2044. Phase-by-phase Vimshottari + Chara dasha progression, major event windows, structural inflection points (Saturn returns, Jupiter cycles, eclipses). v1.0.1 carries CORR.TL.01 correction (Ghati Lagna 9H Sagittarius / Varnada 4H Cancer; lagna-based 'hidden-pinnacle' framing falsified, Ketu MD arc preserved via Ketu-8H exaltation). Source for doc_type=l5_timeline RAG chunks (9 chunks).

Parametric retrieval over chart_facts (795 rows, 37 categories). Primary gateway for quantitative chart-fact queries: shadbala rankings, BAV bindus, yoga register, saham lookups, placements, longevity indicators. Filters: category, planet, house, sign, nakshatra, nakshatra_pada, divisional_chart, keyword, rank_by, limit.

Queries rag_chunks where doc_type='domain_report' (L3). Returns domain synthesis content for 9 domains: career, children, financial, health, parents, psychology, relationships, spiritual, travel. Filter by domain name(s) mapped to source_doc pattern, or by keyword. No new chunking needed — domain_report chunks pre-exist from Pre-KARN-4.

Queries rag_chunks where doc_type='l4_remedial' (L4). Returns remedial prescriptions from REMEDIAL_CODEX_v2_0 PART1+PART2 (21 chunks). Filter by planet (Mercury, Saturn, Mars, etc.) or practice_type (gemstone, mantra, yantra, devata, dinacharya, propit). Chunked by remedial_chunker.py Wave5.
entries.tool_description: Returns L4 remedial prescriptions: gemstone, mantra, yantra, devata, dinacharya, propitiation by planet.

entries.description: Queries rag_chunks where doc_type='l5_timeline' (L5). Returns lifetime timeline content from LIFETIME_TIMELINE_v1_0 (9 chunks) — dasha phase arcs, event windows, structural inflection points. Filter by dasha_name or keyword. NOTE: Next MD after Mercury is Ketu MD (2027-08-21). Chunked by timeline_chunker.py Wave5.

entries.description: Per-mechanism shadow-to-production discipline for the Learning Layer (LL.1–LL.7); §3 promotion criteria APPROVED at NAP.M4.4 (2026-05-02): N>=3, var<=0.3, two-pass approval, validity margin match_rate>=0.4. Authoritative gate for every LL weight write in M4-B and M4-C.

M4-A sub-phase sealing artifact (LEL Ground-Truth Spine). 8 sections; 10/10 ACs PASS; 1 doc-drift carry KR.M4A.CLOSE.1 (DISCHARGED at M4-B-S3); 1 LOW carry KR.M4A.RT.LOW.1 (commit 0793719 malformed root tree). Successor sub-phase: M4-B (LL.1–LL.4 activation). M4 macro-phase remains active.

Native decision (NAP.M4.3 / AC.M4A.8) on KR.M3A.JH-EXPORT (DIS.009 verification path): Option Y — carry forward to M5. DIS.009 stays resolved-R3-pending-ECR. JH integration target: M5 alongside Sthana+Drik Shadbala ECR + Narayana Dasha ECR per ED.1.

LEL chronological-completeness audit against v1.6 corpus (46 events). 11 gaps flagged with native dispositions (NAP.M4.2): 1 partially_closed (GAP.M4A.04 travel post-LEL-v1.6-patch) + 5 deferred + 5 accept. §5.5 documents B.10-strict full-close attempt audit verdict PARTIAL_CLOSE. Implements PHASE_M4_PLAN AC.M4A.7.

LL.1 two-pass approval pass_1 record for the 30 promotion-eligible signals. pass_1_reviewer = Claude-surrogate-M4-B-S2 (surrogate-for-Gemini, MACRO_PLAN §Multi-Agent flagged); 30 approved / 0 held / 0 demoted. pass_2 binding gate: native at NAP.M4.5 (M4-B close).

LL.1 shadow signal-weight register (M4-B-S1). 380 signals observed across 37 training events (9 held-out excluded). Buckets: 30 promotion_eligible_pending_two_pass / 285 insufficient_observations / 52 shadow_indefinite_low_match_rate / 13 shadow_indefinite_high_variance. n=1 disclaimer binding.

LL.1 production-pending register (M4-B-S2 pass_1 output). 30 signals; weights_in_production_register=false; downstream pipeline must NOT consume until pass_2 (NAP.M4.5) discharges. Tier-A=24 / Tier-B=3 / Tier-C=3 (SIG.MSR.118/.119/.143 yoga-absences flagged).

Native-facing pass_2 dossier for NAP.M4.5 — binding gate for production promotion of the 30 LL.1 signals. 6 sections incl. full 30-signal table sorted by mean_match_rate, deep-dive on 3 Tier-C yoga-absences (joint-firing analysis: empirical signature of three independent phenomena, not one phenomenon counted three times), spot-check guide, and blank pass_2 decision-record template. ~20 min review.

LL.2 graph edge weight modulator design document (authored before computation per AC.S3.3). §3 deterministic algorithm; §3.5 EMPIRICAL ADJUSTMENT — strict cross-domain filter relaxed at compute time given LEL training corpus is domain-stratified (every event fires actual_lit_signals from a single domain bucket); §5 output schema; §6 known limitations at n=37.

LL.2 stability gate decision record (AC.S3.2 + AC.M4B.3). gate_decision = CONDITIONAL_PASS — LL.2 shadow writes permitted, production promotion BLOCKED until LL.1 NAP.M4.5 (pass_2) closes. Re-evaluation trigger: NAP.M4.5 close per §5.

LL.2 shadow edge-weight register (M4-B-S3). 9,922 edges (HIGH=0, MED=8 Pancha-Mahapurusha clique on SIG.MSR.117/.118/.119/.143/.145/.402, LOW=9,914, ZERO=0). cross_domain_count=0; intra_domain_count=9,922 per §3.5 finding. All edges promotion_blocked pending NAP.M4.5. Held-out 9 events sacrosanct.

LL.3 domain-bucket coherence diagnostic recommendation (M4-B-S4). 10-bucket MSR-anchored coverage: 134/495 signals (27%) never fired across 3 unobserved buckets (family/psychological/spiritual); education structurally absent. 7 recommendations: 3 fix-before-prod (R.LL3.1–.3) + 4 investigate-in-M5 (R.LL3.4–.7). Recommendation document only; no shadow→production split per protocol §2 LL.3 row.

LL.4 qualitative-tier prediction prior recommendation (M4-B-S4). Training mean=0.630 / held_out=0.913 — held_out flagged as not a clean validity figure under H1 selection-bias hypothesis. classical_rule + both bases at 1.000 perfect calibration; temporal_engine 0.4267 = variance carrier. Tiers STRONG / MODERATE (0.4–0.5) / WEAK with date-precision modifier. Recommendation document only; no shadow→production split per protocol §2 LL.4 row.

LL.4 machine-readable prior view (M4-B-S5). Companion JSON for LL4_PREDICTION_PRIOR_v1_0.md §4–§5 qualitative findings: 10 domain priors + 3 signal-class priors (classical_rule / both / temporal_engine) + date-precision global modifier. Placed in signal_weights/ (not shadow/) per recommendation-artifact rationale — not a weight register subject to shadow→production rules; consumer contract documented in JSON.consumer_contract + LL4 §8. Authored at NAP.M4.5 close (M4-B-S5).

LL.5 Dasha-Transit Synergy design document (M4-C-S1, parallel to M4-C-S2). Specifies per-signal dasha-transit axis-weight modulator algorithm, inputs (LL.1 promoted weights + LEL lit_source field), output schema for ll5_dasha_transit_v1_0.json, and shadow-mode constraints. Mechanism naming diverges from PHASE_M4C_PLAN §3.1 — brief-driven instantiation as "Dasha-Transit Synergy" rather than the plan's "Retrieval ranking learning" framing; logged as R.LL5DESIGN.1 in S1's design §6. Registered by parallel S2 session per S1 brief's may_touch deferral on manifest.

LL.5 Dasha-Transit Synergy shadow register (M4-C-S1). Per-signal dasha-axis vs transit-axis weight modulator computed from training-partition LEL lit_source attribution. Held-out 9 events excluded. Shadow-status; no shadow→production split this round. Registered by parallel M4-C-S2 session.

LL.6 Temporal Density Modulator design document (M4-C-S2). Specifies per-event density_weight = 1 / log2(cluster_size + 1) computed over 365-day rolling window (±182 days) on 37 training events. Per-signal density-adjusted mean_lit_score applies weight to lit_score per observation then averages. §6 H2 dense-cluster-inflation test rejected at n=37 (weighted-form gap_reduction −0.0069). Held-out 9-event partition sacrosanct.

LL.6 Temporal Density Modulator shadow register (M4-C-S2). 37 events with cluster_size + density_weight (distribution {1:7, 2:10, 3:11, 4:8, 5:1}); 380 LL.1-observed signals with mean_lit_score_density_adjusted + delta + meaningful_flag (255 of 380 = 67% meaningful_flag at delta>0.1; mean delta 0.2202; max 0.5693). Summary block carries H2 dense-cluster-inflation test result (gap_reduction −0.0069 weighted; informational only — no LL.1 weight revision).

LL.7 Discovery Prior Rubric design document (M4-C-S3). Implements NAP.M4.6 Option B (classical-seeded) under DECISION-2 literal msr_anchors-clique CDLM construction approved 2026-05-02. Four-class taxonomy confirmed/unconfirmed/novel/contradicted (noise excluded). Empirical-confirmation gate = raw N≥3 per NAP §6.3(b) verbatim; density-weighted count reported alongside as informational per LL.6 design's H2-rejected stance. §4 sanity-check: 8 MED-tier LL.2 anchors classify as `novel` (not `confirmed`) under literal construction — NAP §6.2 anticipatory-rationale clarification recorded in NAP §6.3.A v1.2. CF.LL7.1 CDLM-patch carry-forward flagged for M4-D/M5.

LL.7 Discovery Prior shadow register (M4-C-S3). CDLM literal msr_anchors-clique union over 81 cells = 136 unique edges (58 anchor signals). 37 training events; 9 held-out excluded. Density-weighted pair co-activations computed; threshold = raw N≥3 (density-weighted reported alongside as informational, NOT the gate). Summary: 0 confirmed / 136 unconfirmed / 107 novel / 0 contradicted; 9867 noise pairs excluded; 243 emitted edges. Sanity-check gate sanity_anchor_novel_count=8 PASS — all 8 MED-tier LL.2 anchors carry cdlm_declared:false and support='novel'. Native-only mode — no shadow→prod split per SHADOW_MODE_PROTOCOL §2 LL.7 row.

M4-B sub-phase sealing artifact (LL.1-LL.4 activation). PHASE_M4_PLAN AC.M4B.1-10 = 10/10 PASS; in-document IS.8(b) red-team PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; 0 CRITICAL/HIGH; 4 carry-forwards (F.RT.S6.M.1 mirror DISCHARGED at M4-C-S1; F.RT.S6.M.2 manifest-entry CLOSED at this M4-C-S4 registration; F.RT.S6.N.1 parallel-version-coordination open; F.RT.S6.I.1 outer-metadata doc-hint open). Successor sub-phase: M4-C.

M4-C sub-phase sealing artifact (LL.5/LL.6/LL.7 native-only activation). PHASE_M4_PLAN AC.M4C.1-5 = 5/5 PASS; per-session brief ACs S1.1-S4.9 = 32/32 PASS; in-document IS.8(b) red-team PASS 5/5 axes 0 findings. LL.5 Dasha-Transit axis-weight modulator first shadow write (380 signals); LL.6 Temporal Density Modulator first shadow write (255/380 meaningful adjustment, H2 rejected); LL.7 Discovery Prior first SHADOW write per NAP.M4.6 OPTION_B_APPROVED_LITERAL_CONSTRUCTION + DECISION-2 (243 edges = 107 novel + 136 unconfirmed; sanity 8/8 novel PASS; CF.LL7.1 deferred). DECISION-1 R.LL5DESIGN.1 mechanism-naming propagated to MACRO_PLAN v2.1 + PHASE_M4C_PLAN v1.0.1 + SHADOW_MODE_PROTOCOL v1.0.1. Successor sub-phase: M4-D (M4 macro-phase close).

M4 MACRO-PHASE sealing artifact (M4-D-S1 single-session substantive close). NAP.M4.7 APPROVED (pre-decided per execution brief; CF.LL7.1 = alpha CDLM patch parallel session M4-D-P1; KR.M4A.RT.LOW.1 = DEFER; R.LL1TPA.1 = FINAL_NOT_REACHABLE). IS.8(b) macro-phase-close red-team PASS 5/5 axes 0 findings (RT.1 LL.N computation discharge; RT.2 NAP.M4.1-7 verdicts; RT.3 shadow-mode discipline; RT.4 CURRENT_STATE v-sequence audit; RT.5 schema_validator baseline 108). Six sections: §1 LL.1-LL.7 outcomes; §2 NAP registry; §3 carry-forward roster (35-item enumeration with final dispositions); §4 IS.8(b) red-team verdicts; §5 M5 setup recommendations (8 items); §6 known asymmetries (R.LL1TPA.1 Gemini gap; CF.LL7.1 parallel patch; KR.M4A.RT.LOW.1 deferred tree). Successor macro-phase: M5.

Phase O Observatory governance plan. Two-layer ledger (telemetry + reconciliation) over LLM cost & usage across five providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, NIM). 5-table data model: llm_usage_events, llm_pricing_versions, llm_provider_cost_reports, llm_cost_reconciliation, llm_budget_rules. 30-session O.0–O.4 sub-phase decomposition with full session matrix. Wall-clock projections 4-way / 8-way concurrency. MP.9 mirror pair declared at this S0.1 close. Concurrent workstream alongside the main M-phase thread (currently M5 INCOMING).

Phase O O.3 budget-rules CRUD: GET /api/admin/observatory/budget-rules (list with ?active=true|false|all filter) + POST /api/admin/observatory/budget-rules (create). Gated by OBSERVATORY_ENABLED + requireSuperAdmin(). Validates threshold > 0 and alert_thresholds.pct ∈ [0, 100]. Persists to llm_budget_rules (migration 038).

Phase O O.3 budget-rules per-id CRUD: GET / PATCH / DELETE on /api/admin/observatory/budget-rules/{id}. DELETE is soft (sets active=false; never DROPs). PATCH accepts partial updates over name | scope_value | amount_usd | alert_thresholds | active. Same observatory guard.

Phase O O.3 budget evaluation: GET /api/admin/observatory/budget-rules/evaluate. Evaluates active rules against llm_usage_events.computed_cost_usd over the rule's period (daily/weekly/monthly UTC); ?rule_id=X scopes to a single rule. Returns BudgetEvaluationResult[] sorted by pct_used DESC. Status taxonomy: ok | warning | alert | exceeded.

Phase O O.3 budget-rules evaluation engine. computePeriodBounds (daily/weekly ISO/monthly UTC) + computeScopeSpend (total | provider | model | pipeline_stage) + classifyBudgetStatus + evaluateBudgetRule (never-throws contract; DB error → status=ok with spend=0) + evaluateAllRules. Pure where possible; the DB-touching paths accept a query helper for testing.

Phase O O.3 budget-rules persistence + validation. listBudgetRules / getBudgetRuleById / createBudgetRule / patchBudgetRule / softDeleteBudgetRule + validateBudgetRuleInput / validateBudgetRulePatch. Aligns to migration 038's column names (budget_rule_id, amount_usd, active) rather than the brief's earlier draft names; brief-DB divergence documented in budget/types.ts.

Phase O O.3 budget-rules public type surface: BudgetScope (alias of LlmBudgetScope; total | provider | model | pipeline_stage), BudgetPeriod, AlertThreshold, BudgetStatus (ok | warning | alert | exceeded), BudgetRuleInput, BudgetEvaluationResult. Re-exports DB-frozen vocabulary so callers have one import path.
